name: Upflow
description: Upflow — Accounts receivable and cash collections software for growing B2B finance teams

seo.title: Upflow — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Upflow: Upflow — Accounts receivable and cash collections software for growing B2B finance teams

when_to_use: Accounts receivable collections software for B2B finance teams
Automated dunning and payment reminders for unpaid invoices
Cash collections analytics and aging report for growing SaaS

pros: Modern UX focused on B2B collections
Clear workflows for growing finance teams
Collaboration features between finance and sales
cons: Focused on AR only — not a billing platform
Pricing tiers scale quickly with AR volume
review.verdict: One of the more modern AR tools for growing B2B teams — good UX, narrow scope.
review.best_for: Growing B2B finance teams wanting a modern cash collection workflow on top of their ERP.
review.not_for: Enterprises needing deep O2C or US-centric billing + payments depth.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
